title: Bundled skill update conflicts
subtitle: A new version of the bundled skills is available, but you have modified your local copy.
overlappingHint: This file changed on both sides.
applyRomDesc: Replace your local copy with the new Nakiros version. Your changes will be lost.
keepMineDesc: Keep your local copy. This update won't be proposed again until Nakiros publishes a newer one.
promoteMineDesc: Copy your local version into the repo ROM (dev only).
diffBinary: Binary file — diff cannot be displayed.
diffPickFile: Select a file to view the diff.
